Home.title: Gift the art of Thai relaxation
Home.subtitle: An Imbir Thai Spa certificate — online in 2 minutes. Pick a program or an amount, design a beautiful e-card and send it instantly or on a chosen date.
Home.how1Text: A program from the catalog or a gift amount
Home.how2Text: Card design and your own message
Home.how4Text: Delivered by email or WhatsApp — instantly or on a chosen date
Home.nomSubtitle: Give the freedom of choice — the recipient picks their favorite program at any salon.
Home.faqQ1: How fast is the certificate delivered?
Home.faqA1: Instantly after payment — to the recipient's email or WhatsApp. Or on the date and time you choose.
Home.faqA2: Standard validity is 12 months from purchase. Please confirm exact terms with the salon administrator.
Home.faqQ3: Can it be used in any city?
Home.faqA3: Yes — network certificates are accepted at all Imbir salons: Astana, Almaty, Karaganda, Pavlodar.
Home.faqQ4: What if the program costs more than the value?
Home.faqA4: The difference can be paid at the salon. If it costs less, the remainder stays on the certificate balance.
Home.faqA5: Yes — for 5+ certificates leave a request on the Corporate page and we will prepare an offer with branded cards.

Catalog.title: Programs & prices
Catalog.subtitle: Current prices of the Imbir Thai Spa network. Pick a duration and create a certificate.

Builder.title: Create your certificate
Builder.s1Hint: A specific program, or an amount — the recipient chooses.
Builder.s1SalonHint: Choosing a salon is required: it defines which programs are available.
Builder.s3Hint: These details will appear on the certificate.
Builder.s3MessagePh: E.g.: Happy birthday! Rest your body and soul 🌿
Builder.s4Hint: We will send the certificate instantly or on a chosen day — e.g. right on the birthday.
Builder.s4BuyerEmail: Your email (copy of the certificate and receipt)
Builder.s4CopyNote: A copy will also be sent to you
Builder.createdText: Order number: {orderId}. Online payment (Kaspi Pay and cards) is coming in the next development stage — after payment the certificate will be generated and delivered automatically.
Builder.errRequired: Please fill in the required fields
Builder.errGeneric: Could not create the order. Please try again.
Builder.errRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and retry.

Success.title: Certificate paid!
Success.subtitle: We sent the certificate to the recipient and a copy to your email. Thank you for gifting care!
Success.waitingText: This usually takes a few seconds. The page will refresh automatically.
Success.onceNote: The code is shown only once — save it. It is also in the PDF certificate in the email.
Success.alreadyClaimed: The code has already been shown. You can find it in the email with the PDF certificate.
Success.claimError: Could not retrieve the code. Refresh the page or contact us.
Success.waMessage: You've got a gift from Imbir Thai Spa! Certificate code:

MockPay.title: Order payment
MockPay.note: Test mode: no real charge is made. Kaspi Pay and Freedom Pay are connected under contract.

Consent.checkbox: I have read and fully accept the public offer, the privacy policy and the rules

Check.title: Verify a certificate
Check.subtitle: Enter the certificate code to see its status and balance.
Check.label: Certificate code
Check.notFound: Certificate not found. Check the code — format IMB-XXXX-XXXX.
Check.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.

Legal.onlyRu: This document is available in Russian.

Corporate.title: Corporate orders
Corporate.subtitle: Certificates for employees and partners — from 5 pieces, with branded cards. Leave a request and a manager will contact you.
Corporate.success: Request sent! A manager will contact you shortly.
Corporate.error: Could not send the request. Please try again.
Corporate.errRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and retry.

Footer.about: A network of Thai massage & spa salons. Therapists certified by the best schools of Thailand.
